definitions: 棍棒，短棍（尤指用作武器）

examples.text: Suddenly, the golden band tightened around Sun Wukong’s head, causing explosive pain. He became too weak to use his cudgel or somersault away. Only now did Tripitaka recognize the spell’s power.
examples.explanation: 这里的 cudgel 指孙悟空使用的棍棒；句子意思是他痛到虚弱，无法使用棍棒或翻筋斗逃走。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
